description:
A beautiful, feature-rich prayer timer application for Windows.

Daily Prayer Timer is a comprehensive Windows application designed to help you keep track of Islamic prayer times with a premium UI, accurate calculations, and smart notifications.
v2.4.4 Features:
- Embedded Modern Settings Screen integrated directly inside the main app window
- Single-Row Tabbed Settings Navigation with modern custom icons
- Dynamic Layout & Footer Management (auto-hides nav bar when settings open)
- Exhaustive Help & Settings Directory with full parameter documentation
- Built-in System Log Viewer (app_log.txt & audio_log.txt) with Copy Logs button
- Ultra-Slim 2px Fluent Scrollbars with hover/drag translucent coloring
- Zen Mode Refinements: collapses tabs, trackers, and banners for pure focus
- Global Font Scaling Optimization with thread-safe weak-referencing listener
- Fixed First-Click Blank Tab initialization bug
- Fixed ComboBox dropdown text invisibility in Log Viewer
- Resolved all CS8618/CS8600/CS8604/CS8625 compilation warnings
